personalize.solution.hpoobjective.CfnAbo:
The metric to optimize during hyperparameter optimization (HPO).

**Note**  
Amazon Personalize doesn't support configuring the `hpoObjective` at this time.

personalize.solution.hpoobjective.Metric.Description: A regular expression for finding the metric in the training job logs.

personalize.solution.hpoobjective.Type.Description: The type of the metric. Valid values are `Maximize` and `Minimize`.
